recentArticles.title: Fetty Wap has a lot to say on 'Zavier.’ It’s his first album since being released from prison - Greenwich Time
recentArticles.snippet: During that time, he thought about everything he missed: his family, his kids, the sound of a car engine as he drives, food — “I love to eat,” he told The Associated Press — and, of course, music. Fun Fetty Wap abounds on “Zavier,” as does a serious Fetty Wap, a lustful Fetty Wap, a tender Fetty Wap. It's “a lot of different sounds up in there,” he says. “The whole ‘Zavier’ thing is just, like, bring back the same energy as the ‘Fetty Wap’ album,” he continued, referencing his 2015 breakthrough record — the one that brought the diamond-selling “Trap Queen” to the masses. I’m going to sound Max B and then I’m gonna make Max B sound like the old Max B,'” he said about the song “BossDon.” But it worked. He also looked toward his family for inspiration: Fetty Wap's sisters are featured on the album on the throwback “White Roses.”. “'White Roses' is actually my favorite track,” says Fetty Wap.

recentArticles.title: 12 Albums Out This Week You Should Listen to Now - Pitchfork
recentArticles.snippet: # 12 New Albums You Should Listen to Now: Grace Ives, Underscores, BTS, and More. Also stream new releases from CA7RIEL & Paco Amoroso and Anna Calvi. We first got a taste of Grace Ives’ new album *Girlfriend* last November, when she shared three singles (in her terminology, a “thringle”) and a blog post detailing her state of mind: “Stop dwelling. Her new album *U* builds the momentum of three killer singles and a year of teasing glitched-out, atmospheric pop with the confident kick of big-room EDM. Anna Calvi’s new EP swaggers out of the shadows with the gothic cabaret barnstormer “God’s Lonely Man,” Calvi’s wraithlike falsetto writhing around a gruff lead from Iggy Pop. The EP’s three remaining tracks also feature guest vocalists, namely Perfume Genius—on a Nick Cave and PJ Harvey-worthy cover of Bonnie “Prince” Billy’s “I See a Darkness”—Matt Berninger, and Laurie Anderson, who threads her deadpan into a choral spin of Kraftwerk’s “Computer Love” that somehow ends up sounding like a Lost Girls track. New Music Releases and Upcoming Albums in 2026.

recentArticles.title: Kehlani announces her self-titled album rooted in identity and growth - Q News Pty Ltd
recentArticles.snippet: # Kehlani announces her self-titled album rooted in identity and growth. **The Grammy Award winning Kehlani has officially announced her next chapter, revealing that her highly anticipated self-titled album *Kehlani* will drop on April 24.**. For an artist known for emotional honesty and genre-blurring sound, a self-titled album signals something bigger. As an openly lesbian artist, Kehlani has long been celebrated for bringing queer experiences into mainstream music without compromise. Her blend of artistry, visibility and authenticity has made Kehlani a powerful voice both within and beyond the queer community. At the upcoming *Billboard Women in Music* award night, Kehlani will receive the *Impact Award.* An honour to recognise her artistry, advocacy, and influence on culture and community. If early details are anything to go by, the album *Kehlani* will capture the artist at her most self-assured and creatively free. Self-titled albums often mark a turning point. To pre-save or pre-order the album, including signed copies, head to kehlani.lnk.to/album. > A post shared by Kehlani (@kehlani).

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Explains Why He Refused to Settle That Sexual Assault Lawsuit: ‘It Ain’t in My DNA’ - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: Jay said he “needed the people around me more than ever” to overcome the anger he felt, especially because it didn’t feel right to channel those emotions to the place he usually would: music. “I’m not sure with the amount of negativity in the world that people needed me to add to that with my feelings — because it would have been harsh, and it would have been harsh on everybody,” he said. “I know what she’s trying to accomplish and anything that I can contribute — I mean, that’s my family, first of all — I thought it was super important,” he said. While Jay said he was ready to play “all offense” in 2026 after a couple of years on defense, it’s unclear whether that’ll include new music. I don’t know what *I* need to create currently that’s going to fulfill me and make me happy because that’s most important,” he said.

recentArticles.title: BTS’s Comeback Show Was Heavy on Their New Album - The New York Times
recentArticles.snippet: Delivering the K-pop boy band BTS’s comeback concert on Saturday from downtown Seoul to Netflix’s 325 million subscribers and the band’s global fan base. Instead of starting in New York with an appearance on NBC’s “Today” show and a performance in Grand Central Terminal for the “Tonight Show,” as BTS did in 2020, the band is starting with a free comeback concert on Saturday in the historic center of Seoul that’s being livestreamed on Netflix. So the fact that they chose to wear looks by the Korean brand Songzio for their comeback concert was, like their choice of venue (Seoul’s historic Gwanghwamun Square) and the name of their album (“Arirang,” a 130-year-old Korean folk song), a statement as much about the place of Korean culture and identity on the global stage as about style. Such is the gravitational pull that BTS exerts in its home country, where the group — a symbol of South Korea’s cultural export power — is ending its nearly four-year hiatus with a highly anticipated concert at Gwanghwamun Square in Seoul on Saturday.

The Ontario Premier has announced that the provincial government plans to ban ticket resale transactions at prices exceeding face value, making it illegal for tickets to concerts, cultural, sports and other live events to be resold for more than their original cost. “With these new measures, consumers would no longer need to worry about being ripped off in the ticket resale market, and more families and fans would have the opportunity to see their favourite band or sports team perform live,” says Stephen Crawford, minister of public and business service delivery and procurement, in a statement. The news comes at the same time that on the other side of the country, Consumer Protection B.C. has reached a deal with StubHub Canada, following claims that ticket buyers for Taylor Swift's final Eras Tour shows in Vancouver were sold undisclosed “obstructed view” seats.

recentArticles.title: Jeff Klein Isn’t Selling San Vicente Bungalows — Unless It’s “F*** You” Money - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: Is Jeff Klein looking to open a San Vicente Bungalow in Palm Springs? That was the question left open by *The Wall Street Journal*’s March 19 bombshell scoop — that Klein, 54, was working with Goldman Sachs and real-estate firm JLL to find a new investment partner for his high-end hospitality empire, long a magnet for A-list celebs and industry climbers, ostensibly as part of an expansion plan. Notably, though, the *Journal* also reported that Klein would “consider selling a majority or even all of the businesses,” including his West Hollywood and New York properties. Rambling Reporter gave Klein a call to clear up the confusion and learned that it’s definitely the former — unless, of course, the money ends up being stupid enough for it to be the latter. We are open to the right partner to help us grow, but not to compromise what makes it special,” says Klein, who these days is something of a Hollywood royal himself — as is his husband of nearly 15 years, John Goldwyn, grandson of Samuel.

recentArticles.title: Charlotte Cardin’s ‘The Way We Touch’ Debuts in the Top 50 on Billboard Canadian Hot 100 - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: As a well-known bilingual artist with hits in both of Canada's official languages, the song marks Cardin’s return to singing in English — her first since 2024’s **A Week in Nashville** EP. The song dropped the same week as his new global collaboration "Ranjha" with Sia and David Guetta, which debuted for the first time at Toronto Metropolitan University for students in the historic first course dedicated to a Punjabi artist in partnership with *Billboard Canada*. Scoring over five million monthly listeners, the Nanaimo, B.C.-native has expanded his streaming success onto the charts, notching multiple hits on the Billboard Canadian Hot 100, most recently with “You And Me,” his first-ever love song. The rise of streaming has allowed artists to go beyond their home country, exporting globally — Canada slots in as one of the top 10 countries exporting artists, known for francophone artists reaching audiences beyond Québec and diaspora-driven genres like Punjabi-Canadian music hitting a stride, led by artists like Karan Aujla.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊主要報導加拿大歌手Charlotte Cardin的音樂成就，並未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: R&B/Hip-Hop Fresh Picks of the Week: Alex Isley, 6LACK, Afroman, Jorja Smith & More - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # R&B/Hip-Hop Fresh Picks of the Week: Alex Isley, 6LACK, Afroman, Jorja Smith & More. Listen to new must-hear songs from R&B/hip-hop artists like Jastin Martin and Mudbaby Ru. Kyle Denis, Christopher Claxton, Michael Saponara, Angel Diaz. With Fresh Picks, *Billboard* aims to highlight some of the best and most interesting new sounds across R&B and hip-hop — from a new 6LACK joint to a high-octane link-up between Mudbaby Ru and Key Glock. Five-time Grammy nominee 6LACK is back with “Bird Flu,” the first single from his highly anticipated new *Love Is the New Gangsta* album, and it’s a real smooth listen. And while the undeniable banger, “Will You Help Me Repair My Door,” is getting all the attention, I would like to highlight “Why You Disconnecting My Video Camera” because the disses in this song got brought up during the trial as the cops tried to sue for defamation over a diss track that not many knew existed until recently.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容未提及周杰倫，主要報導Billboard的R&B/Hip-Hop新歌推薦，包含Alex Isley、6LACK、Afroman等藝人。

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Won't Apologize for Being a Billionaire - Business Insider
recentArticles.snippet: Billionaire rapper Jay-Z says his success isn't about "selling out." It's about getting paid. Then it was like: You're selling out because you're making money," Jay-Z said. Jay-Z was alluding to the leftist refrain that there's no such thing as a "good" billionaire, an idea that suggests amassing so much wealth requires exploiting other people's labor, and that hoarding it fuels inequality. Later in the interview, Jay-Z explicitly pushed back on this dichotomy, saying "people behave the way they want to behave" regardless of how much money they have. "With that success, I've done things with my reach that I wanted to do that was helpful for a lot of people," he continued, adding, "A person with more money can do more good. Jay-Z has since been joined on music's list of billionaires by his Roc Nation signee, Rihanna; his wife, Beyoncé; and his industry friend, Taylor Swift.
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞主要報導饒舌歌手Jay-Z為其億萬富翁身份辯護，並未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Jay-Z Opens Up About Kendrick-Drake Beef in Rare Interview - Pitchfork
recentArticles.snippet: After praising Kendrick Lamar’s performance at the 2025 Super Bowl halftime show, Jay went long on the beef between Drake and Lamar, positioning it in the context of the “four pillars of hip-hop”: breakdancing, graffiti, DJing, and battling. He lamented that stan culture forces fans to align with one side of a beef: “Now, people that like Kendrick hate Drake, no matter what he makes. It’s like an attack on his character.” The culture, he said, “could stand [the sparring] before because there was no social media. “And the culture is happily playing along in the name of this insane thirst of Stan culture to have something on the other side.” He also accepted his own place in rap-beef legend: “I actually regret that because I *really* like Nas,” he told Tharpe of the two rappers’ turn-of-the-millennium duel. “I didn’t pick the indie artist that I really like from Portland,” Jay said.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導Jay-Z對嘻哈界恩怨的看法，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

latestReport.daily_summary: 周杰倫今日焦點圍繞新專輯《太陽之子》發行。主打歌MV斥資上億由《阿凡達》團隊打造，專輯中更收錄為小女兒Jacinda創作的《女兒殿下》，並預告將曝光他向昆凌求婚的浪漫影片。他還透露了求婚時的核彈級內幕，以及曾兩度恐慌症發作的經歷。此外，周董也鬆口未來巡演最終站可能回到台灣。
key_events: 透露求婚內幕與恐慌症
